sets.passage: Our school had never won the regional science competition, so when our team of four was chosen to (1)___, no one expected much. From then on, instead of asking 'who broke it', we asked 'how can we (8)___ it'. On competition day, we were terribly (9)___: other teams had fancier equipment and more confident (10)___. When our turn came, our hands shook, but the device worked (11)___. sets.passage: When Sara joined our class halfway through the year, she clearly felt completely (1)___. She sat alone at lunch, spoke to no one, and kept her eyes fixed on her (2)___.
